generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData D435iDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor providing real-time telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor providing real-time telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance D435iDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, ROS2Middleware
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth data from Intel D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData D435iDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for node communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for prototyping"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance CppNodeLifecycle : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for node lifecycle management"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL databases for storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateDisplayInsight, ObjectTracksDisplayInsight, DrivingPathDisplayInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCExecutionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management commands for ACC enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksDisplayInsight, DrivingPathDisplayInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Timeseries analysis of vehicle state for reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance VehicleStateDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state for driver transparency"
]

instance ObjectTracksDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of object tracks for driver transparency"
]

instance DrivingPathDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization for driver transparency"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save vehicle state and object track data to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Timeseries analysis of vehicle state for generating reports"
]

instance ACCExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execute ACC system on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via remote management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for speed control via voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance TraxxasSlashVehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle"
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis for steering and speed control"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis for autonomy platform"
]

instance AutonomyComponents : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Autonomy components including Jetson NX, Orin Nano, LiDAR, camera"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle hardware"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity on cloud server"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for remote management interface"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for integration"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TraxxasSlashVehicle, LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, AutonomyComponents, PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Motor voltage commands for speed control, steering servo commands for direction, and emergency braking signals generated by ACC Controlling FE and Actuation FE to actuate the physical vehicle in response to remote management commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with maximum 100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all components to ensure event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User, Cross-System) with ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, and Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and compliance validation, and during operation for optimization and health monitoring; represents the 'as operated' phase of the physical vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-entity communication via ROS2 network; inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi using OPC Unified Architecture (UA) for Data Translation FE per ISO 23247 standard."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) and User Entity hosted in cloud for computation offloading; Data Storage external to vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]
